question: What text overlay appears alongside the ingredient name 'Broccoli' during the chopping scene? A. BROCCOLI SALAD B. 2 heads, chop C. The Cooking FOODIE D. The Cooking
How many heads of broccoli are specified in the text overlay during the preparation phase?
What is the primary color of the broccoli florets shown throughout the video? A. Green B. Black C. White D. Red
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: Green broccoli florets coated in creamy white dressing sit in a black bowl and on a white plate. Text overlays reading 'BROCCOLI SALAD' and 'The Cooking FOODIE' appear in the corners. Hands use a silver knife to chop fresh broccoli heads on a light wooden cutting board. Dark red pieces mix with the green vegetables.

question: Did the video feature BOTH a black bowl for the salad AND broccoli chopping on a wooden board? A. Only black bowl B. Only broccoli chopping C. Both black bowl and broccoli chopping D. Neither

Where is the text instruction regarding chopping broccoli displayed? A. Center of the screen B. Overlaid on the food C. Bottom left corner D. Top left corner
What action is the person performing in this segment? A. showing title B. chopping pecans C. lifting salad
Describe the specific actions taken to prepare the broccoli ingredient shown in the video.
canonical_answer: At 14s, a hand holds a silver knife over green broccoli on a wooden board; at 15s, the blade contacts the vegetable stem; at 16s, the knife slices through the stem of a floret; at 18s, the florets are chopped into smaller pieces accumulating on the surface.

question: What change happens in this clip? A. Chopped broccoli transferred from cutting board to clear glass bowl B. Dried cranberries added to clear glass bowl C. Toasted pecans poured from pan onto cutting board D. Sunflower seeds added to clear glass bowl

What will be done with the pecans after they are poured into the frying pan?
canonical_answer: The pecans are toasted in the dark grey speckled frying pan.
